title: ICRISAT Research Program West and Central Africa 2016 Highlights
abstract:
This program, in partnership with research and
development institutions in West and Central Africa,
develops and promotes technologies for sustainably
enhancing agricultural productivity with a focus
on sorghum, pearl millet and groundnut as well as
crop-livestock integration under a changing climate.
The strategic research within this program targets
a range of interventions that span agro-ecological
zones to benefit communities and villages, increase
the resilience of smallholder agriculture and exploit
market demand opportunities.
